BackgroundMaterialand methodsAims
Results3D Investigationof Myelonets(myeloidnetworks) in OvarianCancerTumorMicroenvironment
Anastasiia Kachalova1, Ada Junquera2, Inga-Maria Launonen2, Anni Virtanen2,3, Ulla-Maija Haltia2,4, Anniina Färkkilä1,2,4,5
•Myeloid cells are known to play key supressive role in tumor microenvironment of HGSOC (myeloid-derived supressor cells, macrophages)1,2•Previous findings reveal aggregates of myeloid cells (> 10 cells) across most of HGSOC samples•Create a workflow for 3D visualization of tumor microenvironment •Create a myeloid-focused antibody panel•Perform 3D vizualizationof myelonets
DNATumorStromaMyeloidcellsDNATumorIBA-1CD163CD451. MyelonetsinfiltratingtumoraremostlyM2-like macrophagesthroughtheZ-axis
2. Myelonetscontainactivated(ANXA2+) M2+like macrophages
AuthorsaffilationsFuturework•Cell segmentation, celltypecallingand quantificationsfor everysection•CharacterizetheTME composition and functionalheterogeneityin 3D•Acquirethecohortof patientswithclinicallyrelevantdifferencesand analyzepresenceand composition of myelonetsanastasiia.kachalova@helsinki.fi
References1.BaertT, VankerckhovenA, RivaM, Van HoylandtA, ThirionG, Holger G, MathivetT, VergoteI and CoosemansA (2019) MyeloidDerivedSuppressorCells: Key Driversof Immunosuppressionin OvarianCancer.Front. Immunol.10:1273.
